title: Hook registry row — one TSV row in hook_registry.tsv
description: Flat catalogue row, one per page hook / panel / widget that asks APLR for a set of layers. Pages do not consume analyses directly — they declare the layers they need; the librarian resolves whether those layers are present / missing / blocked / ready-to-run; the dispatcher (separate concern) decides whether to run anything. requires_layers is a comma-separated FK into layer_registry.layer_id.

hook_id.description: Stable id. Convention: <page>_<event>. Example: mendelian_page_load, popstats_panel_open.

page_id.description: Which page this hook belongs to. Empty allowed for global hooks.

provides_view.description: Label for the rendered view (e.g. mendelian_panel, fst_track). Free-form.

requires_layers.description: Comma-separated layer_ids the hook NEEDS to render. FK into layer_registry.layer_id. Per LAYER_GRAPH_BUILDER_SPEC.md §5: a required layer that resolves to KNOWN_MISSING / BLOCKED / UNKNOWN / FAILED becomes a VISIBLE_BLOCKED panel.

optional_layers.description: Comma-separated layer_ids the hook CAN render but does not require. FK into layer_registry.layer_id. Per spec §5: optional layers that fail to resolve become HIDDEN_OPTIONAL panels (collapsed, not red).

panels.description: Comma-separated panel_id labels matched 1:1 with (requires_layers + optional_layers) in order. Empty allowed; the librarian will mint panel_ids as '<layer_id>_panel'.

scope_dims.description: Comma-separated dimension names the hook is parameterized over (sample_set, interval, candidate_id, chromosome). Informational; the resolver uses these to know what scope keys to expect when called.

definition_path.description: Optional path to a richer per-hook JSON.
